page_title: Amigo Global — Goods from around the world

hero.title:
Make cross-border
wholesale
as **simple** as
local buying.
hero.desc: Amigo Global is a B2B/B2C cross-border marketplace connecting the United States with global buyers and sellers. We focus on general merchandise, clearance inventory, and wholesale supply so one app can connect sellers with millions of buyers.

cards.title: B2B Global Inventory Wholesale
cards.desc: Serving independent retailers and discount chains with container, pallet, and bulk purchasing options.

cards.title: B2C Discount Marketplace
cards.desc: More than one million discounted products connecting inventory with global retail demand.

cards.title: Live Clearance Channel
cards.desc: Real-time video commerce and professional hosts create urgency and accelerate inventory turnover.

cards.title: Global Visual Auction Center
cards.desc: Visual presentation and global bidding unlock stronger returns for high-value and non-standard inventory.

cards.title: Secure Payments
cards.desc: Safe, compliant, and transparent cross-border settlement designed to reduce payment risk.

cards.title: Global Logistics
cards.desc: One-stop customs, overseas delivery, smart routing, and efficient last-mile fulfillment.

cards.title: Global Supply Chain
cards.desc: Connect overseas ecommerce inventory and factory supply with stable retail demand worldwide.

cards.title: AI-Powered Operations
cards.desc: Demand matching, analytics, and real-time translation simplify the complete transaction journey.

news.title: Latest updates
news.lead: Follow the latest Amigo Global developments.

cards.title: The Amigo Global app is in beta testing
cards.summary: A simpler way to source, sell, and shop across borders is coming soon.

cta.title:
Whether you are a brand, buyer
or **investor**, we would like to meet you.
